data.name: LayPleerDescription.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="tbPleerDescription" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,50,Percent,50" /><Rows Styles="Absolute,21,Absolute,21,Absolute,21" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: LayPleerAudioRoad.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="tbPleerCurrentTime" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="tbPleerCommonTime" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="tbPositionSec" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Absolute,60,Absolute,334,Absolute,60" /><Rows Styles="Percent,100" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: LayPleerButtons.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="btnLoop" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnMix" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnPrev" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="4" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnPlay" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="5" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnNext" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="6" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="tbVolume" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="8" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Absolute,48,Absolute,48,Absolute,48,Absolute,10,Absolute,48,Absolute,48,Absolute,48,Absolute,20,Absolute,20" /><Rows Styles="Absolute,40,Absolute,40,Absolute,20" /></TableLayoutSettings>
